root_text.an3.114:1.3: Tathāgatassa, bhikkhave, arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvo dullabho lokasmiṁ, tathāgatappaveditassa dhammavinayassa desetā puggalo dullabho lokasmiṁ, kataññū katavedī puggalo dullabho lokasmiṁ.
root_text.an3.114:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ pātubhāvo dullabho lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an3.114:1.1: “Mendicants, the appearance of three individuals is rare in the world.
translation_text.an3.114:1.3: A Realized One, a perfected one, a fully awakened Buddha. A teacher of the teaching and training proclaimed by a Realized One. An individual who is grateful and thankful.
translation_text.an3.114:1.4: The appearance of these three individuals is rare in the world.”
